# Rox dT, rxdt.dev

Personal site of Rox dT: agent tools, AI evaluation projects, and practical
software including the AI Deployment Calculator, a browser tool that estimates
GPU VRAM and hardware for AI workloads.

The site is a static, multi-page TypeScript + Vite app developed by coding
agents (Claude, Codex, and other CLI agents) running in a repo-native loop
harness: prompts, specs, project status, tests, and gate checks live with the
code, and agents commit only after passing guardrails such as ESLint,
Stylelint, HTML validation, strict TypeScript, Vitest coverage, Playwright,
Lighthouse, dependency checks, security checks, and containment rules.

Site: https://rxdt.dev/
Repository: https://github.com/rxdt/rxdt.github.io
AI Deployment Calculator: https://vram.rxdt.dev/
Calculator source: https://github.com/rxdt/ai_deployment_calculator
